T001.name: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.html with full HTML structure (HUD bar, Phaser container, chord prompt, keyboard area, start screen overlay, game over overlay, all CDN script tags including Phaser 3)
T001.description: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.html with full HTML structure (HUD bar, Phaser container, chord prompt, keyboard area, start screen overlay, game over overlay, all CDN script tags including Phaser 3)

T002.name: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.css with flexbox column layout for 4 zones (HUD ~50px, Phaser container flex-grow, chord prompt ~80px, keyboard area 220px)
T002.description: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.css with flexbox column layout for 4 zones (HUD ~50px, Phaser container flex-grow, chord prompt ~80px, keyboard area 220px)

T003.name: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.js skeleton with IIFE module pattern (window.Chordessy namespace), constant/state placeholders, Phaser config and Scene stubs, empty BattleBridge class, DOMContentLoaded init()
T003.description: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.js skeleton with IIFE module pattern (window.Chordessy namespace), constant/state placeholders, Phaser config and Scene stubs, empty BattleBridge class, DOMContentLoaded init()

T004.name: Implement init() function: build keyboard via shared.js, setup audio, setup MIDI, instantiate Phaser game with parent 'phaser-container', type Phaser.AUTO, transparent true
T004.description: Implement init() function: build keyboard via shared.js, setup audio, setup MIDI, instantiate Phaser game with parent 'phaser-container', type Phaser.AUTO, transparent true

M1.name: Milestone 1: Phaser 3 Scene Setup and Canvas Integration
M1.description: Milestone 1: Phaser 3 Scene Setup and Canvas Integration

T005.name: Create BattleScene class extending Phaser.Scene with preload(), create() (set world bounds, create star field, store scene dimensions), and update(time, delta) for star field scroll tick
T005.description: Create BattleScene class extending Phaser.Scene with preload(), create() (set world bounds, create star field, store scene dimensions), and update(time, delta) for star field scroll tick

T006.name: Implement createPhaserGame(): read #phaser-container dimensions via getBoundingClientRect(), create Phaser.Game with container dimensions, set scale.mode to Phaser.Scale.RESIZE, transparent background
T006.description: Implement createPhaserGame(): read #phaser-container dimensions via getBoundingClientRect(), create Phaser.Game with container dimensions, set scale.mode to Phaser.Scale.RESIZE, transparent background

T007.name: Implement canvas resize handler: window resize event listener recalculates container size, calls game.scale.resize(width, height), notifies bridge to remap key positions
T007.description: Implement canvas resize handler: window resize event listener recalculates container size, calls game.scale.resize(width, height), notifies bridge to remap key positions

T008.name: Implement star field background: ~100 small white circles at random positions with random speeds, stars scrolling off bottom respawn at top (or use Phaser particle emitter with createCanvas texture)
T008.description: Implement star field background: ~100 small white circles at random positions with random speeds, stars scrolling off bottom respawn at top (or use Phaser particle emitter with createCanvas texture)

T009.name: Create BattleBridge class with constructor taking {scene, keyboardContainer, keyElements}, properties: keyXMap (Map<midiNote, {x, width, isAccidental}>), heldNotes (Set), targetMidi (array), emitter (Phaser.Events.EventEmitter)
T009.description: Create BattleBridge class with constructor taking {scene, keyboardContainer, keyElements}, properties: keyXMap (Map<midiNote, {x, width, isAccidental}>), heldNotes (Set), targetMidi (array), emitter (Phaser.Events.EventEmitter)

T010.name: Implement buildKeyXMap() and rebuildKeyXMap(): iterate .key elements, read getBoundingClientRect(), convert to Phaser canvas-relative x coordinates, store {x: centerX, width, isAccidental} per MIDI note
T010.description: Implement buildKeyXMap() and rebuildKeyXMap(): iterate .key elements, read getBoundingClientRect(), convert to Phaser canvas-relative x coordinates, store {x: centerX, width, isAccidental} per MIDI note

T011.name: Implement noteOn(midiNote), noteOff(midiNote), setTargetChord(chordSymbol, midiNotes), and checkChord() using pitchClassesMatch() for chord detection with wrongNote emission
T011.description: Implement noteOn(midiNote), noteOff(midiNote), setTargetChord(chordSymbol, midiNotes), and checkChord() using pitchClassesMatch() for chord detection with wrongNote emission

T012.name: Implement onBulletHit(), onWaveCleared(), onGameOver() bridge methods for Phaser-to-HTML communication
T012.description: Implement onBulletHit(), onWaveCleared(), onGameOver() bridge methods for Phaser-to-HTML communication

T013.name: Wire all input handlers in init(): MIDI onNoteOn/onNoteOff, QWERTY_MAP keydown/keyup, mouse/touch delegation — all routing through BattleBridge with audio.playNote() and .pressed class feedback
T013.description: Wire all input handlers in init(): MIDI onNoteOn/onNoteOff, QWERTY_MAP keydown/keyup, mouse/touch delegation — all routing through BattleBridge with audio.playNote() and .pressed class feedback

M3.name: Milestone 3: Enemy Spawning and Key-Aligned Positioning
M3.description: Milestone 3: Enemy Spawning and Key-Aligned Positioning

T014.name: Create Enemy class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with constructor(scene, midiNote, x, y, isAccidental), child objects: glow ellipse (alpha 0.3), body ellipse/polygon (white-key: radius ~20px cyan, black-key: radius ~16px purple), label text (hidden by default)
T014.description: Create Enemy class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with constructor(scene, midiNote, x, y, isAccidental), child objects: glow ellipse (alpha 0.3), body ellipse/polygon (white-key: radius ~20px cyan, black-key: radius ~16px purple), label text (hidden by default)

T015.name: Implement Enemy.spawnAnimation(): tween fade in alpha 0->1, y drops from off-screen to target row over ~500ms with Phaser.Math.Easing.Back.Out
T015.description: Implement Enemy.spawnAnimation(): tween fade in alpha 0->1, y drops from off-screen to target row over ~500ms with Phaser.Math.Easing.Back.Out

T016.name: Implement Enemy.die() (death particle burst, alive=false, destroy after animation) and Enemy.showLabel() (show note name text for level 15+)
T016.description: Implement Enemy.die() (death particle burst, alive=false, destroy after animation) and Enemy.showLabel() (show note name text for level 15+)

T017.name: Implement BattleScene.spawnEnemies(midiNotes, level): clear existing enemies, for each MIDI note create Enemy at key-aligned position (level<15) or random position with label (level>=15), stagger spawn animations by ~100ms
T017.description: Implement BattleScene.spawnEnemies(midiNotes, level): clear existing enemies, for each MIDI note create Enemy at key-aligned position (level<15) or random position with label (level>=15), stagger spawn animations by ~100ms

T018.name: Implement layered laser beam rendering: outer line (6px, alpha 0.2, cyan 0x00ffff), middle line (3px, alpha 0.5, bright cyan), inner line (1px, alpha 1.0, white) stored in laserGroup Map<midiNote, {outer, middle, inner}>
T018.description: Implement layered laser beam rendering: outer line (6px, alpha 0.2, cyan 0x00ffff), middle line (3px, alpha 0.5, bright cyan), inner line (1px, alpha 1.0, white) stored in laserGroup Map<midiNote, {outer, middle, inner}>

T019.name: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOn(midiNote, x, isCorrect): correct note creates laser from key bottom to enemy position with pulsing tween; wrong note creates red flash column (alpha 0.5->0 over 300ms)
T019.description: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOn(midiNote, x, isCorrect): correct note creates laser from key bottom to enemy position with pulsing tween; wrong note creates red flash column (alpha 0.5->0 over 300ms)

T020.name: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOff(midiNote): remove laser lines for that midiNote from laserGroup, destroy game objects
T020.description: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOff(midiNote): remove laser lines for that midiNote from laserGroup, destroy game objects

T021.name: Implement BattleScene.onChordComplete(): all active lasers pulse to max brightness, after 200ms trigger enemy.die() for all enemies, clear all lasers
T021.description: Implement BattleScene.onChordComplete(): all active lasers pulse to max brightness, after 200ms trigger enemy.die() for all enemies, clear all lasers

T022.name: Create Bullet class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with core ellipse (~6px red/orange), glow ellipse (~12px alpha 0.3), particle trail emitter (red/orange, short lifespan), speed and active properties
T022.description: Create Bullet class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with core ellipse (~6px red/orange), glow ellipse (~12px alpha 0.3), particle trail emitter (red/orange, short lifespan), speed and active properties

T023.name: Implement Bullet.update(delta): move y += speed * delta/1000, emit bulletHit if y > canvasHeight; Bullet.deflect(): particle burst shatter effect, set active=false, destroy
T023.description: Implement Bullet.update(delta): move y += speed * delta/1000, emit bulletHit if y > canvasHeight; Bullet.deflect(): particle burst shatter effect, set active=false, destroy

T024.name: Implement bullet spawning for levels 1-9: after 1000ms ready beat, pick random alive enemy, create single Bullet at enemy position, speed = baseSpeed(40) + level*speedIncrement(8)
T024.description: Implement bullet spawning for levels 1-9: after 1000ms ready beat, pick random alive enemy, create single Bullet at enemy position, speed = baseSpeed(40) + level*speedIncrement(8)

T025.name: Implement BattleScene.update() bullet loop: iterate bullets array, call bullet.update(delta), check y > canvasHeight for bulletHit, destroy and remove from array
T025.description: Implement BattleScene.update() bullet loop: iterate bullets array, call bullet.update(delta), check y > canvasHeight for bulletHit, destroy and remove from array

T026.name: Implement chordComplete bullet destruction (all bullets call deflect(), clear array, all enemies die()) and bulletHit handler (decrement HP, screen flash red, wave stays active at level 10+)
T026.description: Implement chordComplete bullet destruction (all bullets call deflect(), clear array, all enemies die()) and bulletHit handler (decrement HP, screen flash red, wave stays active at level 10+)

M6.name: Milestone 6: HP System, Scoring, Combo, and Wave Progression
M6.description: Milestone 6: HP System, Scoring, Combo, and Wave Progression

T027.name: Implement battleState object with all properties: running, tier, wave, level, score, hp, maxHp, combo, bestCombo, wavesCleared, wavesMissed, waveStartTime, progressionMode, currentProgression, progressionIndex, bulletSpeed
T027.description: Implement battleState object with all properties: running, tier, wave, level, score, hp, maxHp, combo, bestCombo, wavesCleared, wavesMissed, waveStartTime, progressionMode, currentProgression, progressionIndex, bulletSpeed

T028.name: Implement startBattle(tier): reset all state, read progression mode checkbox, hide start screen, show HUD, call nextWave()
T028.description: Implement startBattle(tier): reset all state, read progression mode checkbox, hide start screen, show HUD, call nextWave()

T029.name: Implement nextWave(): increment wave, check level-up every 5 waves, pick chord (random or progression), set bridge target, update prompt display, spawn enemies, record waveStartTime, start bullet fire after ready beat
T029.description: Implement nextWave(): increment wave, check level-up every 5 waves, pick chord (random or progression), set bridge target, update prompt display, spawn enemies, record waveStartTime, start bullet fire after ready beat

T030.name: Implement onWaveCleared(): calculate score (100 base + speed bonus up to 50 + combo multiplier up to 10x), update state (score, combo++, wavesCleared++), update HUD, show floating score popup, call nextWave() after 500ms delay
T030.description: Implement onWaveCleared(): calculate score (100 base + speed bonus up to 50 + combo multiplier up to 10x), update state (score, combo++, wavesCleared++), update HUD, show floating score popup, call nextWave() after 500ms delay

T031.name: Implement onBulletHit(): decrement HP, reset combo to 0, update HP bar and combo display, if HP<=0 call onGameOver(), else at levels 1-9 clear wave and spawn new chord, at 10+ keep going
T031.description: Implement onBulletHit(): decrement HP, reset combo to 0, update HP bar and combo display, if HP<=0 call onGameOver(), else at levels 1-9 clear wave and spawn new chord, at 10+ keep going

T032.name: Implement onGameOver(): set running=false, stop all scene activity (clear enemies, bullets, lasers), emit gameOver event, show game over overlay with final stats
T032.description: Implement onGameOver(): set running=false, stop all scene activity (clear enemies, bullets, lasers), emit gameOver event, show game over overlay with final stats

T033.name: Implement HUD update functions: updateScoreDisplay(), updateHPBar() with color classes (green>60%, yellow>20%, red<=20%), updateComboDisplay() with show/hide and pulse animation, updateWaveDisplay()
T033.description: Implement HUD update functions: updateScoreDisplay(), updateHPBar() with color classes (green>60%, yellow>20%, red<=20%), updateComboDisplay() with show/hide and pulse animation, updateWaveDisplay()

M7.name: Milestone 7: Levels 1-9 vs 10+ Bullet Behavior Split
M7.description: Milestone 7: Levels 1-9 vs 10+ Bullet Behavior Split

T034.name: Implement BattleScene.startBulletFire(level): level<10 fires single bullet after 1000ms delay from random alive enemy; level>=10 fires from each enemy independently on staggered timers using time.addEvent with loop
T034.description: Implement BattleScene.startBulletFire(level): level<10 fires single bullet after 1000ms delay from random alive enemy; level>=10 fires from each enemy independently on staggered timers using time.addEvent with loop

T035.name: Implement getFireInterval(level): Math.max(800, 2500 - (level-10)*200) — Level 10: 2500ms, Level 15: 1500ms, Level 19+: 800ms floor
T035.description: Implement getFireInterval(level): Math.max(800, 2500 - (level-10)*200) — Level 10: 2500ms, Level 15: 1500ms, Level 19+: 800ms floor

T036.name: Implement getBulletSpeed(level): 40 + level*8 px/sec — Level 1: 48, Level 5: 80, Level 10: 120, Level 15: 160
T036.description: Implement getBulletSpeed(level): 40 + level*8 px/sec — Level 1: 48, Level 5: 80, Level 10: 120, Level 15: 160

T037.name: Implement differentiated onBulletHit behavior: levels 1-9 removes enemies and advances to next wave; level 10+ enemies and remaining bullets persist, only chordComplete ends the wave
T037.description: Implement differentiated onBulletHit behavior: levels 1-9 removes enemies and advances to next wave; level 10+ enemies and remaining bullets persist, only chordComplete ends the wave

T038.name: Add progression state tracking to battleState: progressionMode, currentProgression ({name, tier, chords}), progressionIndex, progressionDamaged, breatherWavesRemaining
T038.description: Add progression state tracking to battleState: progressionMode, currentProgression ({name, tier, chords}), progressionIndex, progressionDamaged, breatherWavesRemaining

T039.name: Modify nextWave() for progression mode: pure random if disabled; when enabled, alternate between progression chords and 1-2 breather waves, award +200 bonus for flawless progression completion, chain back-to-back at level 10+
T039.description: Modify nextWave() for progression mode: pure random if disabled; when enabled, alternate between progression chords and 1-2 breather waves, award +200 bonus for flawless progression completion, chain back-to-back at level 10+

T040.name: Implement showProgressionComplete(name): Phaser scene banner text 'Progression Complete!' with progression name, tween scale up, hold 1s, fade out
T040.description: Implement showProgressionComplete(name): Phaser scene banner text 'Progression Complete!' with progression name, tween scale up, hold 1s, fade out

T041.name: Implement playProgressionReplay(progression): use audio.playChord() to replay each chord sequentially with ~400ms gaps as musical payoff
T041.description: Implement playProgressionReplay(progression): use audio.playChord() to replay each chord sequentially with ~400ms gaps as musical payoff

T042.name: Implement progression HUD display: update #progression-info text with progression name and position (e.g. 'Jazz ii-V-I 2/3'), show/hide based on progression mode
T042.description: Implement progression HUD display: update #progression-info text with progression name and position (e.g. 'Jazz ii-V-I 2/3'), show/hide based on progression mode

M9.name: Milestone 9: Difficulty Scaling and Level 15+ Random Positioning
M9.description: Milestone 9: Difficulty Scaling and Level 15+ Random Positioning

T043.name: Implement full difficulty scaling table: bullet speed 48-200px/s (capped), fire mode single/continuous, fire interval 2500-700ms (floored), enemy position key-aligned/random+labels across levels 1-20+
T043.description: Implement full difficulty scaling table: bullet speed 48-200px/s (capped), fire mode single/continuous, fire interval 2500-700ms (floored), enemy position key-aligned/random+labels across levels 1-20+

T044.name: Update spawnEnemies() for level 15+ random positioning: random x with padding, random y in top 40% of canvas, showLabel() on each enemy with note name
T044.description: Update spawnEnemies() for level 15+ random positioning: random x with padding, random y in top 40% of canvas, showLabel() on each enemy with note name

T045.name: Implement ready beat scaling: levels 1-4 = 1500ms, levels 5-9 = 1000ms, levels 10+ = 800ms, levels 15+ = 500ms before first bullet fires
T045.description: Implement ready beat scaling: levels 1-4 = 1500ms, levels 5-9 = 1000ms, levels 10+ = 800ms, levels 15+ = 500ms before first bullet fires

T046.name: Implement enemy spawn animation speed scaling: lower levels 500ms drop-in, higher levels 300ms drop-in for faster enemy appearance
T046.description: Implement enemy spawn animation speed scaling: lower levels 500ms drop-in, higher levels 300ms drop-in for faster enemy appearance

T047.name: Create procedural particle textures in BattleScene.create(): generate 4x4 white pixel canvas texture via this.textures.createCanvas('particle', 4, 4)
T047.description: Create procedural particle textures in BattleScene.create(): generate 4x4 white pixel canvas texture via this.textures.createCanvas('particle', 4, 4)

T048.name: Implement createDeathBurst(x, y, tint): Phaser particle emitter with 20-30 particles, speed 50-200, lifespan 400ms, tint matching enemy color, slight gravity, scale 1.0->0; screen shake on last enemy of wave
T048.description: Implement createDeathBurst(x, y, tint): Phaser particle emitter with 20-30 particles, speed 50-200, lifespan 400ms, tint matching enemy color, slight gravity, scale 1.0->0; screen shake on last enemy of wave

T049.name: Implement bullet trail particles: emitter follows bullet position, red/orange tint, small particles, 200ms lifespan, 5-8 particles per frame
T049.description: Implement bullet trail particles: emitter follows bullet position, red/orange tint, small particles, 200ms lifespan, 5-8 particles per frame

T050.name: Implement bullet deflect particles: white/cyan burst, fewer particles than death, small flash ellipse with scale tween 0->2 and alpha 1->0 over 200ms
T050.description: Implement bullet deflect particles: white/cyan burst, fewer particles than death, small flash ellipse with scale tween 0->2 and alpha 1->0 over 200ms

T051.name: Implement shakeCamera(intensity, duration) using this.cameras.main.shake(): wave clear shake(200, 0.005), bullet hit shake(150, 0.008)
T051.description: Implement shakeCamera(intensity, duration) using this.cameras.main.shake(): wave clear shake(200, 0.005), bullet hit shake(150, 0.008)

T052.name: Implement CSS screen flash on bullet hit: .damage-flash class on #battle-container with @keyframes damageFlash (rgba(255,0,0,0.3) -> transparent over 300ms), remove class after animation ends
T052.description: Implement CSS screen flash on bullet hit: .damage-flash class on #battle-container with @keyframes damageFlash (rgba(255,0,0,0.3) -> transparent over 300ms), remove class after animation ends

T053.name: Add laser glow enhancement: fourth wider semi-transparent line layer beneath existing three laser lines for stronger glow effect
T053.description: Add laser glow enhancement: fourth wider semi-transparent line layer beneath existing three laser lines for stronger glow effect

T054.name: Implement HP crack animation: HP bar shakes on HP decrease (CSS animation), HP text flashes red
T054.description: Implement HP crack animation: HP bar shakes on HP decrease (CSS animation), HP text flashes red

T055.name: Implement combo celebration: at combo milestones (5x, 10x), golden particle fountain from score display position + 'Nx COMBO!' text in Phaser scene with scale-up and fade tween
T055.description: Implement combo celebration: at combo milestones (5x, 10x), golden particle fountain from score display position + 'Nx COMBO!' text in Phaser scene with scale-up and fade tween

M11.name: Milestone 11: Start Screen and Game Over Screen
M11.description: Milestone 11: Start Screen and Game Over Screen

T056.name: Implement start screen (#battle-start-screen): gradient title 'Chordessy', subtitle 'Battle Mode', four tier buttons (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced/Expert), progression mode checkbox, MIDI status text, click handler calls startBattle(tier)
T056.description: Implement start screen (#battle-start-screen): gradient title 'Chordessy', subtitle 'Battle Mode', four tier buttons (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced/Expert), progression mode checkbox, MIDI status text, click handler calls startBattle(tier)

T057.name: Implement game over screen (#battle-game-over): gradient 'Game Over' title, large final score, stats row (Waves Cleared, Damage Taken, Best Combo, Level Reached), 'Play Again' button, optional 'Try Chord Trainer' link
T057.description: Implement game over screen (#battle-game-over): gradient 'Game Over' title, large final score, stats row (Waves Cleared, Damage Taken, Best Combo, Level Reached), 'Play Again' button, optional 'Try Chord Trainer' link

T058.name: Implement screen transitions: start screen fades out (CSS opacity 300ms), game over screen fades in (CSS opacity 300ms), Phaser scene pauses while overlays visible
T058.description: Implement screen transitions: start screen fades out (CSS opacity 300ms), game over screen fades in (CSS opacity 300ms), Phaser scene pauses while overlays visible

T059.name: Implement state management: Phaser game created once on page load but scene paused until game starts, startBattle() resumes scene and resets state, onGameOver() pauses scene and shows overlay, 'Play Again' returns cleanly with no state leaks
T059.description: Implement state management: Phaser game created once on page load but scene paused until game starts, startBattle() resumes scene and resets state, onGameOver() pauses scene and shows overlay, 'Play Again' returns cleanly with no state leaks

M12.name: Milestone 12: Navigation Links Between All Three Modes
M12.description: Milestone 12: Navigation Links Between All Three Modes

T060.name: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/index.html .mode-switch div: add links to both 'Chord Trainer' (game.html) and 'Battle Mode' (battle.html)
T060.description: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/index.html .mode-switch div: add links to both 'Chord Trainer' (game.html) and 'Battle Mode' (battle.html)

T061.name: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/game.html: change navigation to link to both 'Neural Arpeggiator' (index.html) and 'Battle Mode' (battle.html) on start screen and game over screen
T061.description: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/game.html: change navigation to link to both 'Neural Arpeggiator' (index.html) and 'Battle Mode' (battle.html) on start screen and game over screen

T062.name: Add battle.html navigation links: .mode-switch on both start screen and game over screen with links to 'Neural Arpeggiator' (index.html) and 'Chord Trainer' (game.html)
T062.description: Add battle.html navigation links: .mode-switch on both start screen and game over screen with links to 'Neural Arpeggiator' (index.html) and 'Chord Trainer' (game.html)
